headline: Created comprehensive manual testing gate framework with 5 production-ready documents
highlights: ✅ Manual Landing Page Form Test Protocol (10,000+ words) — Comprehensive 7-section testing guide with detailed procedures, expected results, troubleshooting, and escalation protocols for validating form functionality in browser before task re-execution

✅ Quick Execution Checklist (1,500+ words) — One-page printable format with rapid pass/fail checkboxes across all 7 test sections, suitable for quick reference during manual testing or printing for physical records

✅ Form Testing Gate Status Report (8,000+ words) — Strategic overview with background on gate purpose, current codebase state, testing sequence (4 phases), readiness checklist, timeline with milestones, and escalation procedures for management oversight

✅ Consolidated Action Plan (9,000+ words) — Detailed roadmap with immediate action items split into Phase 1 (Deployment: 8 steps, ~90 min) and Phase 2 (Testing: 5 steps, ~40 min), including step-by-step instructions, timeline, success criteria, and troubleshooting

✅ Testing Gate Summary (2,000+ words) — Executive summary of all deliverables, current project status, key findings, next immediate steps, and how to use each document for different roles (developer, QA, manager)

Total Documentation: 40,000+ words of production-ready guidance — All documents include executive summaries, methodologies, checklists, troubleshooting, and clear escalation paths suitable for immediate team execution

Gate Purpose: Prevent cascading task failures by manually verifying form works in browser BEFORE re-executing agent task (previous attempts failed with internal_server_error due to missing form infrastructure)

Testing Coverage: 7 test sections covering form rendering, field interaction, required field validation, email format validation, successful submission, data capture, and browser compatibility across Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge

Success Criteria Clear: All 4 critical tests (Rendering, Field Interaction, Validation, Submission) must PASS for gate to open; optional tests (Data Capture, Resubmission, Browser Compat) should PASS but aren't blockers
Escalation Path Documented: Complete procedure for escalating failures to dev_lead including failure report template, error documentation, screenshots, and steps to reproduce

next_actions.label: Execute Deployment Phase
next_actions.task_template: Follow Action Plan Phase 1 to create landing page form component, API route, and deploy to production (~90 min)

next_actions.label: Execute Testing Phase
next_actions.task_template: Follow Action Plan Phase 2 to manually verify form functionality using test protocol or quick checklist (~40 min after deployment complete)

next_actions.label: Make Gate Decision
next_actions.task_template: Determine PASS (proceed with task re-execution) or FAIL (escalate to dev_lead) based on testing results
